recommendations: add a minimal MCP smoke-test suite (import server
list tools
execute one call per endpoint) and run it in CI

max steps
timeout
cancellation)

rate limiting

add compatibility tests for optional stacks (matplotlib
ipywidgets
mpi4py) to ensure graceful degradation
add wheel/build verification for native extension availability in MCP runtime environments
create benchmark scenarios (small/medium/large N-body) and track performance budgets in CI

success_factors: Workflow completed all expected nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize) with overall status=success and no runtime errors/warnings.
Import-first adapter strategy was appropriate for REBOUND (import feasibility 0.94, low intrusiveness risk), reducing integration friction.
Generated MCP scaffold included core service files, startup entrypoint, dependency manifest, and documentation.
MCP plugin health check passed (healthy over stdio), indicating baseline service operability.
failure_reasons: Validation depth is limited: original project tests were not executed successfully (passed=false with empty details), and MCP test coverage appears shallow.
Observability/performance telemetry is incomplete (0 or missing values for memory/CPU/latency/throughput), limiting confidence in runtime characteristics.
DeepWiki enrichment failed, reducing architecture/context depth available to automation.

node_performance.download_time: Repository ingestion succeeded via zip fallback; likely acceptable for ~152 files, but per-node timing was not captured.
node_performance.analysis_time: Static/module analysis completed successfully and identified key domains (simulation/particle/orbit/simulationarchive); no measured node duration available.
node_performance.generation_time: Code generation completed quickly enough within total 229.99s workflow time; created 7 MCP output files.
node_performance.test_time: MCP health/startup checks passed, but meaningful functional tests are missing; original project test execution result is inconclusive.

resource_usage.memory_efficiency: Unknown due to missing metrics (reported 0 MB likely placeholder).
resource_usage.cpu_efficiency: Unknown due to missing metrics (reported 0% likely placeholder).
resource_usage.disk_usage: Low to moderate; only a small MCP scaffold was generated, but generated size/LOC telemetry is missing (reported 0 likely placeholder).
